name: coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse
title: coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse
syntax: long coTfsSDOBlockUploadSegmentResponse( dword ccs, dword cs, dword ackSeq, dword blkSize, dword expMsgNumber, dword startSeqNumber );
description: This function waits for a SDO segmented upload request and sends the corresponding response. Before the call of this function, no time-delay functions should be inserted in order to prevent a loss of the request message.
